items.title: FLiNG-Based Trainer Builds
items.description: The most widely used Crimson Desert trainer is based on FLiNG builds. It supports major PC versions and includes core cheat features such as health, stamina, spirit, damage, money, and speed controls.
items.tip: You will be redirected to the original trainer provider.

items.title: WeMod
items.description: WeMod is a trainer platform that provides a simplified interface for enabling cheats. It is suitable for users who prefer a guided setup instead of manual trainer files.

items.title: Aurora or Cheat Engine Tables
items.description: Advanced users may prefer alternative tools such as Aurora or Cheat Engine tables. These options provide more control but require additional setup knowledge.

how-to-use.title: How to Install and Use the Trainer

steps.title: Download the trainer from the selected source
steps.description: Choose the option that best matches your setup preferences.

steps.title: Extract the archive to a folder
steps.description: Unzip the downloaded files before launching anything.

steps.title: Run the trainer as administrator
steps.description: This helps the trainer access the game process correctly.

steps.title: Launch Crimson Desert
steps.description: Wait until the game is fully loaded before enabling options.

steps.title: Activate features using hotkeys or toggles
steps.description: Use the provider's interface or listed keybinds to enable the features you need.

how-to-use.note: Always check version compatibility before launching the trainer.

safety.title: Important Safety Notes
safety.description: Trainers interact with game memory and may trigger antivirus warnings. This behavior is common and does not always indicate malicious intent.

safety_tips.title: Do not use in online or competitive modes

items.question: Why don't you host the trainer directly?
items.answer: To support safer downloads and more accurate versioning, this page links users to the original sources where trainers are maintained and updated.

items.question: Which option should I choose?
items.answer: Most users choose the recommended trainer. Beginners may prefer WeMod if they want an easier setup flow.

items.question: Why is my download blocked?
items.answer: Browser security tools or antivirus software may block trainer files because they modify game memory behavior.

bottom-cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
